reforms.description: Luxembourg plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport from 12% in 2002 to 25% by 2020, necessitating higher prices for individual road transport and extensive investments in public transport.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing public transport usage can reduce congestion and pollution, thereby enhancing overall urban efficiency and quality of life.
reforms.status_evidence: The government plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant shift in transport policy aimed at enhancing public transport infrastructure, which is crucial for sustainable urban development.
reforms.source_quote: Luxembourg plans to increase the share of public transport in motorised transport from 12% in 2002 to 25% by 2020.
